context: Tests whether the agent implements TCPA/GDPR-compliant SMS consent infrastructure: correct disclosure wording, a complete consent schema, proper opt-out keyword handling with mandatory reply, HELP response, EU consent recency expiry, and an audit-trail retention policy.

checklist.name: E.164 phone validation
checklist.description: Phone number is validated using libphonenumber-js (import or reference to the library appears in the code)

checklist.name: Consent schema fields
checklist.description: Consent data model includes at minimum: phone, consentText (the exact disclosure text), ipAddress, userAgent, consentedAt, and jurisdiction fields

checklist.name: TCPA disclosure wording
checklist.description: The disclosure string shown to the user contains all of: 'recurring automated marketing', 'not a condition of purchase', and 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe'

checklist.name: Opt-out keyword coverage
checklist.description: The inbound handler recognises all five opt-out keywords: STOP, UNSUBSCRIBE, CANCEL, QUIT, and END (case-insensitive or normalised to uppercase)

checklist.name: Mandatory opt-out reply
checklist.description: The handler returns a reply message after processing an opt-out (e.g. 'You have been unsubscribed...Reply START to resubscribe')

checklist.name: HELP/INFO response
checklist.description: The inbound handler handles HELP or INFO keywords and returns a response containing store name, opt-out instructions, and support contact

checklist.name: Jurisdiction field
checklist.description: The consent schema stores a jurisdiction value distinguishing at minimum US vs EU contacts

checklist.name: EU consent recency check
checklist.description: The consent validity utility treats EU contacts who consented more than 18 months ago with no subsequent activity as having expired consent

checklist.name: Opt-out timestamp recorded
checklist.description: When an opt-out keyword is received, the handler updates the consent record with an optedOutAt timestamp (not just a boolean flag)

checklist.name: 5-year retention policy
checklist.description: IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md states that consent records are retained for at least 5 years and lists IP address, timestamp, and disclosure text as captured fields
